notes: Minimal cycle baseline cut from real Tushare corpus. Subject: 600519.SH 贵州茅台 (贵州茅台酒股份有限公司, SSE main board) on trade_date 2026-03-31. No namechange events in the cut window. Mirrors case_001_one_stock_one_cycle shape but sources from a real corpus slice rather than synthetic data, so any regression caused by real-world Tushare schema drift or a renamed ts_code resolver will surface loudly. Stock chosen for lowest-noise coverage: stock_basic, stock_company, daily, daily_basic all have 2026-03-31 rows.
